subject: [PATCH] mm/swap_state: remove unnecessary lru_add_drain() from readahead

2026-06-10.patch_summary: This patch removes unnecessary calls to lru_add_drain() in the readahead functions swap_cluster_readahead() and swap_vma_readahead(). The drain was a leftover from an older version of the code and serves no functional purpose for the callers. The folios added to the swap cache by the readahead loop are naturally drained as they fill up the per-CPU LRU batch, eliminating the need for unconditional draining. This patch addresses performance issues on high-CPU systems running memory-pressured workloads.
